scripts.db:reset:all: npm run db:reset --workspace users-ms --workspace vehicles-ms --workspace events-ms --workspace maintenances-ms
scripts.db:migrate:all: npm run db:migrate --workspace users-ms --workspace vehicles-ms --workspace events-ms --workspace maintenances-ms
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate:users && npm run prisma:generate:vehicles && npm run prisma:generate:events && npm run prisma:generate:maintenances
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f vehicles-ms/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f events-ms/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f users-ms/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f maintenances-ms/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f vehicles-ms/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f events-ms/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f users-ms/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f maintenances-ms/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:up
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose -f vehicles-ms/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=100 && docker compose -f events-ms/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=100 && docker compose -f users-ms/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=100 && docker compose -f maintenances-ms/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=100
scripts.docker:ps: docker compose -f vehicles-ms/docker-compose.yml ps && docker compose -f events-ms/docker-compose.yml ps && docker compose -f users-ms/docker-compose.yml ps && docker compose -f maintenances-ms/docker-compose.yml ps
